title: The AI Energy-Demand Forecast Scorecard (interactive)
description: An interactive, explorable front-end to the AI Energy-Demand Forecast Scorecard: a reproducible audit of how the field forecasts data-centre electricity demand, scored on dispersion, the forecasters' own revisions, and transparency. Two views: a forecasts table that measures dispersion only within comparable slices (and otherwise flags incommensurability across units, scopes and horizons), and a transparency funnel (verified, confirmable at the primary source, reproducible). It is a scorecard of forecaster behaviour, not a forecast. Companion to the paper at DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20572928. CC BY 4.0.
